heroSection.title: Lily Bloom Bakery Showcase
heroSection.subTitle: Full-Stack Showcase Website
heroSection.description: A beautiful, multilingual online showcase + admin dashboard built and deployed for a local Brooklyn bakery.

mainContent.overview: Developed and launched a complete full-stack showcase website for a local bakery. The platform features server-side rendering, multilingual support (English & Simplified Chinese), a full admin dashboard, and an automated bulk import pipeline.

keyFeature.body: Next.js 15 App Router with full English / Simplified Chinese support
Secure backend dashboard for menu, orders, and content management
CSV / XLSX + image ZIP upload → automatic extraction → S3 staging
Elastic Beanstalk, Amplify, CloudFront, and S3 for fast global delivery

walkthrough.description: Storefront hero with dramatic bakery photography, powerful tagline, and clear CTA. Built with Next.js 15 App Router + server-side rendering for instant load times. Supports full English / Simplified Chinese language switching with fast page reload. Fully responsive across all mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.

Tabbed category navigation (Bread, Cake, Drink, Pastry) with sub-categories. Rich product cards featuring real photos, pricing, and tags. Data is fetched from MongoDB via Spring Boot REST APIs and rendered with Next.js. The grid layout adapts seamlessly to any screen size.

Interactive map powered by OpenStreetMap showing all bakery locations. Clean sidebar with addresses, opening hours, phone numbers and navigation buttons. Fully responsive and built as a reusable React component for flawless touch interactions on mobile.

Protected admin panel built with React Admin + Spring Boot backend. Full CRUD for menu items, categories, tags, locations, and even a part of website page content. Features bulk CSV/XLSX + image ZIP import pipeline.
